name: Fried Chicken
recipeIngredient: 2 - 3 1/2 pound Frying chicken, cut into 8 pieces
plus more for the finished chicken
recipeInstructions:
1) Trim excess fat and skin from each piece of chicken. Sprinkle pieces with salt and pepper.
2) In a shallow bowl, mix together flour and paprika.
3) Dredge each chicken piece in the seasoned flour to coat all sides. Shake off excess flour.
4) Heat 2 inches of vegetable oil in a heavy deep skillet (cast-iron is ideal) over medium heat until a small cube of bread browns in about 20 seconds.
5) Add only enough chicken pieces that fit without touching. Fry, turning with a long-handled fork or tongs to avoid splatter, until golden brown on all sides and cooked through, about 6 minutes. The chicken is done when juices run clear near the thickest part of the piece.
6) Remove chicken from skillet and let drain. If frying in batches, keep fried chicken warm at 250°F in an oven on a baking sheet. Sprinkle with paprika before serving.
